full_text:
Yan Pu 閻圃
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Pu (閻圃)was born in Baixi. Advised Zhang Lu on the defence against Cao Cao, stopped Lu becoming King. Yan Pu was affiliated with Zhang Lu and the Wei Kingdom. Yan Pu lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
